title: portfolio-moi
description: Interactive personal site with glassmorphism UI, fast filtering, and story-driven slideshows.
details: Purpose-built to showcase projects without heavy frameworks: Vite + vanilla JS, animated filters, and modal slides that highlight outcomes for non-technical viewers. 100/100 Lighthouse performance.

title: CameraInterceptor
description: Swap any Android camera feed with custom imagery (LSPosed module).
details: Hooks legacy Camera, Camera2, and CameraX APIs to inject gallery images system-wide. Built for Android 8.0+ with toggleable profiles.

title: JsonExport
description: Convert nested JSON to Excel/CSV with auto-unescape & smart flattening | 100% client-side | Monaco editor | Privacy-first
details: Client-side Next.js app with Monaco editor, smart flattening, and instant exports (CSV, Excel, HTML, ZIP). Privacy-first: all parsing runs locally; handles 10MB files smoothly.

images.caption: JsonExport Banner showcasing the primary value proposition.
Export panel showing options for CSV, Excel, HTML, and ZIP downloads.
